name: Fleet Health Monitor

hierarchy.note: Operates beneath Universal Horizon. Runs without any host.

description: Probes 4 Ollama instances (ports 11434–11437) via /api/tags with 5s timeout. Reports live/dead instances and loaded models. Exits 0 if any instance reachable; 1 if all unreachable.

env.note: Defaults to localhost ports 11434-11437 if env vars absent.

persistence.note: Stateless — writes no files. Run on demand.

stopRestart.stop: Process exits after all probes complete

importExport.note: Stateless — nothing to export or import.

moduleLaw: No hard dependency on any other module. Safe to run at any time.
